title: SectorZero Trace Pulse
description: A single pulse in a Sector Zero NDJSON trace stream. Each line of a trace file must validate against this schema.

v.description: Protocol version. Always 1 for the current format.

type.description: The pulse type, used as the oneOf discriminator.

net.description: The name of the Net (data structure) this pulse applies to.

oneOf.title: init
oneOf.description: Declares a named Net and sets its initial values. Must be the first pulse on a given net name.

values.description: Initial ordered values of the Net, indexed from 0.

oneOf.title: compare
oneOf.description: Signals that two positions are being compared. Does not mutate state.

i.description: Index of the first element being compared.

j.description: Index of the second element being compared.

oneOf.title: swap
oneOf.description: Signals that two positions are being swapped. Mutates the Net's logical state.

i.description: Index of the first element to swap.

j.description: Index of the second element to swap.

oneOf.title: pin
oneOf.description: Attaches or moves a named marker to a specific position on the Net.

pos.description: The zero-based position the pin points to.

oneOf.title: signal
oneOf.description: Emits a named highlight covering a set of positions on the Net.

positions.description: Zero-based indices covered by this signal. An empty array clears the signal.

oneOf.title: access
oneOf.description: Signals a single-element read at a position. Does not mutate state.

oneOf.title: found
oneOf.description: Signals that a search target was located at the given position. Terminal event for successful searches.

pos.description: The zero-based position where the target was found.

oneOf.title: not_found
oneOf.description: Signals that a search target was not present in the Net. Terminal event for unsuccessful searches.

oneOf.title: bounds
oneOf.description: Signals the current active search window as a [low, high] inclusive range.

low.description: Lower bound of the current search window (inclusive).

high.description: Upper bound of the current search window (inclusive). Must be >= low.

oneOf.title: split
oneOf.description: Signals that a subarray [left, right) is being divided at mid. Used by divide-and-conquer algorithms.

mid.description: The split point. Left subrange is [left, mid), right subrange is [mid, right).

oneOf.title: merge
oneOf.description: Signals that two adjacent subarrays [left, mid) and [mid, right) are being merged.

left.description: Start index of the left subarray (inclusive).

mid.description: Boundary between the two subarrays. Right subarray starts here.

right.description: End index of the right subarray (exclusive).

oneOf.title: write
oneOf.description: Writes a value to a single position. Mutates the Net's logical state.

value.description: The value being written to that position.

oneOf.title: done
oneOf.description: Signals that all operations on this Net are complete. Every initialized Net must end with a done pulse.
